species: Structural characterization of intra- and intermolecular disulfide bonds in voltage-dependent anion channel 3 (VDAC3) protein from Rattus norvegicus by high-resolution mass spectrometry
tissue: the MS analysis was repeated on a second sample (biological replicate) purified from another set of rat liver mitochondria...
cell_type: Mitochondria from rat liver were prepared as reported in Saletti et al. (2017).
disease_state: They participate in the control of glycolytic metabolism through interaction with numerous enzymes and play a key role in the regulation of mitochondria-mediated apoptosis, cancer, and neurodegenerative diseases.
sample_source: the MS analysis was repeated on a second sample (biological replicate) purified from another set of rat liver mitochondria...
strain: Wistar rats obtained from Charles River Laboratories (Lecco, Italy) were sacrificed.
